title: sarcocapnos enneaphylla subsp. enneaphylla
intro: Sarcocapnos enneaphylla subsp. enneaphylla, also known as the nine-leaved poppy or wolf's bane poppy, is a plant species that belongs to the Papaveraceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues such as bloating and gas. The health benefits of Sarcocapnos enneaphylla subsp. enneaphylla include its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as irritable bowel syndrome (IBS) and menstrual cramps. Sarcocapnos enneaphylla subsp. enneaphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
